name: clawd-pager
tagline: Remote pager for AI coding sessions
summary: clawd-pager is a hardware-backed alerting and remote-control system for AI coding sessions, built around M5StickC Plus and ePaper pager devices.
highlights: Remote monitoring for coding session activity
Bridge server, dashboard feed, and pager device integration

content.shortDescription: A low-friction hardware pager system for monitoring and nudging coding sessions from lightweight devices.
